title: Sustained Strength
subtitle: Balancing energy and nourishment
description: As your body’s demands continue to grow, you may notice a slight increase in hunger. Maintaining balanced meals with adequate protein and consistent meal timing can help support your energy and overall well-being.
nutrition_focus: Maintain regular meal and snack timing
Focus on sustained energy through balanced meals
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Protein sources like milk, curd, paneer, lentils, nuts, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or long gaps between meals
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: Balanced meals and timely eating can help you stay energized and comfortable.

diabetes.personalized_description: Regular and balanced meals help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Frequent and balanced meals support steady energy.

anemia.personalized_description: Consistent intake of iron-rich foods supports energy and helps manage fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Regular nourishment supports your energy levels.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent meals support a calm and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A consistent and balanced diet supports overall metabolic stability.
thyroid.reassurance: Balanced nutrition supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, maintaining regular meals with balanced nutrition helps support energy and stability.
priority_nutrition: Maintain regular meal and snack timings
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Consistent nourishment helps you stay energized and balanced.
